name: @vanillagreen/pi-extension-manager
description: Settings-integrated Pi extension inventory, toggles, and schema-driven extension configuration for vstack packages.

settings.label: Enable manager UI
settings.description: Expose /extensions and the manager UI. If disabled, /extensions enable remains available as a recovery command.

settings.label: Show built-in tools
settings.description: Include Pi built-in tools in the inventory. Disable for an extension-focused list.

settings.label: Default save scope
settings.description: Where manager setting edits are written when the selected item scope is ambiguous.

settings.label: Notify on extension updates
settings.description: At session start, post a one-line notification listing extensions with newer versions available from their vstack source repo or npm registry.

author: vanillagreen
